name: io.github.Abhishekkumar2021/github
title: GitHub
description: GitHub via MCP: search, repos, issues, PRs, files, notifications. OAuth device flow or token.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: A GitHub Personal Access Token (skips the OAuth device flow).

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth App client id (public) to enable the device-flow login.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 or true to disable issue-creating/commenting tools.
